Headline: #53 Pulaski Temporary Reroute at Pulaski/Addison
ShortDescription: 53 Pulaski buses are temporarily rerouted via Pulaski, Avondale, Addison, Pulaski and over the regular route due to police activity near Pulaski/Addison.
